description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing Physical Damage, pulls them in front of you, then deals Physical Damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [1sec->3 sec].

For [5sec->7 sec], your [own->Physical] Block Chance is [increased by 400->increased by 200], and when you block, you deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies and reduce their [ATK->Attack] by [22%->25%].

For [5sec->8 sec], all allies’ [P.Block Chance is increased by 400->Physical Damage taken is reduced by 20%], and [prepares->you prepare] to leap [ (added) for 5 sec]. While preparing to leap, [ (added) when you block,] the leap attack’s [DMG->damage] is increased by [8%->7%], you deal Physical Damage to the attacker, [ (added) and stun them for 0.4 sec]. [ (removed) On Block, deals P.DMG to the attacker]. When [preparation ends->casting is complete], you leap to the [nearest->(removed)] enemy, dealing Physical Damage and [stuns->stunning] them for [1sec->2.5 sec]. While preparing to leap, you are immune to [CC->status ailments].
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [84*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))->30(1+0.3Skill Level)] and Physical Block Chance by [120->250].

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [0.5 sec->1.2 sec].

dark.unified: [Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec->Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is [reduced by 1000->increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec].

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [15%->24%] for [5 sec->7 sec].
[Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 6 sec->On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec].

light.unified: Physical Defense increase is [boosted by 30%, and Physical Block Chance is increased by 75->amount increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Physical [Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 250->Block Chance increases by 120].

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [400->100] and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [24%->50%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to [[ {4}->5] times.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [15%->25%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%. On block, has a {1}% chance to [restore {2} Mana to yourself->recover {2} Mana] and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
